creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 180306
patch to the ports tree

The attached patch updates matth/cminpack to version 1.3.6

I sent a patch upstream that was accepted so we have one less patch in files/

From the page:

    * Fix FreeBSD build #6
    * CMake: install CMinpackConfig.cmake rather than FindCMinpack.cmake #8
    * CMake: add option USE_BLAS to compile with blas #9

-QA:
 * portlint -AC: OK
 * poudriere builds for {10.3,11.0}{amd64,i386}: OK
